basic_details.job_title: BBMB Apprentice Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 16 Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Bhakra Beas Management Board (BBMB) has officially announced the Apprentice Recruitment 2026 with 16 openings. The detailed notification was published recently on the official website BBMB bbmb.gov.in. Candidates who meet the age criteria as per the official notification and hold a 10th class examination with a minimum of 40% marks along with a National Trade Certificate in the respective trade (Lineman or Electrician) are eligible to apply online. The application process is currently active and will remain open until 10 July 2026. Eligible candidates can download the official notification

age_limit.age_details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.
age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details and relaxation criteria.

qualification.education_qualification: 10th class examination with minimum 40% marks, National Trade Certificate in respective trade (Lineman or Electrician)
qualification.details: Lineman: 10th class with minimum 40% marks and National Trade Certificate in Lineman trade. Electrician: 10th class with minimum 40% marks and National Trade Certificate in Electrician trade.

salary_details.details: Please refer to the official notification for salary details.

selection_process: Merit List based on marks in 10th and ITI Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the BBMB Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 10-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BBMB to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for BBMB Apprentice recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the BBMB Apprentice posts is 10th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Apprentice post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 16 vacancies for the Apprentice posts, with 15 for Lineman and 1 for Electrician.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for the Apprentice posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed the 10th class examination with a minimum of 40% marks and possess a National Trade Certificate in the respective trade (Lineman or Electrician).

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for BBMB Apprentice recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for BBMB Apprentice posts?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on a merit list prepared from the marks obtained in the 10th class and ITI, followed by document verification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the job type for these Apprentice positions?
faq.answer: The job type for these Apprentice positions is contractual.

faq.question: Q7. Where can I find the official notification for BBMB Apprentice recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article or from the official BBMB website.

faq.question: Q8. What is the application mode for BBMB Apprentice recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply online for the BBMB Apprentice recruitment through the official website.

faq.question: Q9. What is the location of the BBMB recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for positions in Haryana, specifically in Ambala.

faq.question: Q10. Does BBMB offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Please refer to the official notification for details regarding age relaxation for reserved categories.
